/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_robot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o libmy_robot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/my_robot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/my_robot_interfaces/msg/_error_status_s.c.o CMakeFiles/my_robot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/my_robot_interfaces/msg/_object_target_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/student13/debuging/lei_github/nav_test_for_leo/build/my_robot_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so libmy_robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libmy_robot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
